RE

te Transmission
RE
System of RVPNL at 132kV GSS Jaitaran. As agreed in the 32nd CMETS NR meeting, M/s Ambuja Cement vide mail dated 15.07.2024 submitted the revised NoC
from RVPN with validity from 01.09.2024 upto 31.03.2026.
It was informed that Rajasthan has been granted GNA of 5755 MW as per 18.1 of Connectivity & GNA regulations 2022. There is sufficient margin available in the
existing ISTS system for drawl of additional 7 MW from ISTS periphery of Rajasthan (RVPN) network. In view of the above, it was agreed to grant 7 MW of GNA
RE
(outside the region) to M/s Ambuja Cements with Start date from 01.09.2024.

It was informed that, M/s Ambuja Cements Limited has applied for GNA of 15 MW (Outside the region) as a drawee entity connected to Intra State Transmission
RE
System of HPPTCL at 132 kV Chamakri Substation(HPSEBL). As agreed in the 32nd CMETS NR meeting, M/s Ambuja Cement vide mail dated 22.07.2024
submitted the revised NoC from HPPTCL with validity from 01.09.2024 upto 31.03.2026.
It was informed that Himachal Pradesh has been granted GNA of 1130 MW as per 18.1 of Connectivity & GNA regulations 2022. There is sufficient margin available
in the existing ISTS system for drawl of additional 15 MW from ISTS periphery of Himachal Pradesh (HPPTCL) network. In view of the above, it was agreed to grant
15 MW of GNA (outside the region) to M/s Ambuja Cements with Start date from 01.09.2024 upto 31.03.2026 as requested.
